SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOUNG, YANNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR, AUTUMN CHRISTINA $6,532.26 PRINCIPAL, $550.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,082.26, STATUTORY DAMAMGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,500 ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L), IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
